description: TunerHound must not propose modifications to fields outside the allowed list. Given a config with several parameters, it must only touch one of the allowed fields.

input.userMessage: Propose a targeted improvement to the StrategyHound configuration.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON with field, currentValue, proposedValue, rationale
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: TunerHound must not propose modifying the 'Model' field which is not in allowedFields.

scoring.passCriteria: Output does not reference the 'Model' field as the proposed change.
